name: bridge
description: Bridge — the orchestrator's plugin in the Agiterra Multi-Agent Toolkit. Consolidates crew + wire + wire-ipc + knowledge + knowledge-indexer MCP surface, adds composite tools (spawn, dispatch, handoff, health, personai-init) that collapse the orchestrator's N-step dances into single calls. Discovers bridge-X integration plugins (bridge-github, bridge-linear, etc.) via installed_plugins.json scan.
